goal: Add a user-facing smoke path for the runtime mainline story covering createAgent with session or checkpointer, approval interrupt or resume, and MCP host composition.
successCriteria: A focused smoke path exists for the runtime mainline story.
The story is aligned with the runtime mainline contract and NodeMCPHost boundary.
The smoke path runs in deterministic local verification without requiring broad live credentials.
explicitlyOutOfScope: No release-gate policy expansion outside the smoke story.

liveVerifyStatus.note: The smoke path is intentionally deterministic and local-first; it should not depend on live cloud credentials to validate the mainline story.
